creator: ltpig402a@live.com
text:
A 6-CPU core 9.1-RELEASE-p4 system equipped with intel 82599EB NIC with hw.ixgbe.num_queues=6 hangs when traffic volume is heavy.

The system hang can be workarounded by setting hw.ixgbe.num-queues=4

Fix: 

change hw.ixgbe.num_queues=4 (or 2) in /boot/loader.conf
How-To-Repeat: HW/SW setup - 9.1-RELEASE-p4 with the 82599EB NIC on a 6-CPU core system

Using a nginx webserver and use clients like http_load to stress the 10G network interface. System will hang within 30 seconds.

Hard reboot is required.
